name: Herb Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Secure wings and legs to body of chicken.
3. In a small bowl, stir together all herb rub ingredients.
4. Rub the mixture onto the chicken.
5. Place chicken, breast side up, on a rack in a roasting pan.
6. Bake for 2 to 2-1/2 hours or until fork tender.
Variations:
Herb butter chicken with vegetables: Double the ingredients for the herb rub. Rub half onto the chicken; reserve the remaining half. Place 6 new potatoes cut in half, 6 carrots cut crosswise, and 2 medium onions cut into quarters on the bottom of the pan around the chicken. Dollop the reserved herb rub evenly over the vegetables. Baste the chicken and vegetables occasionally during baking time.
